pack:review-depth: Report Critical and High findings always. Additionally report any OWASP Top 10:2025 finding regardless of severity: A01 Broken Access Control, A02 Security Misconfiguration, A03 Supply Chain Failures, A04 Cryptographic Failures, A05 Injection, A06 Insecure Design, A07 Authentication Failures, A08 Software Integrity Failures, A09 Logging and Monitoring Failures, A10 Exception and Error Handling. For all other severity levels, report only when actionable.
pack:scope-discipline: Address the stated request fully. When writing new code, apply secure-by-default choices without annotation (parameterized queries, validated inputs, no hardcoded secrets, least-privilege defaults) unless they materially expand scope. Surface a one-line security rationale only when the choice might surprise the user.
pack:secret-guard: Before staging or committing, check for hardcoded credentials, API keys, tokens, connection strings, or private key material. Refuse to stage any file containing a probable secret and name the exact file and line. If uncertain, surface it and ask — do not proceed.
